title: Protein C and Protein S Tests: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
, Gupta K, et al. Protein S Deficiency. In: StatPearls [Internet]. Treasure Island (FL): StatPearls Publishing; 2025 Jan-. [Updated 2021 Aug 29; cited 2025 Sep 9]. Available from: https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/books/NBK544344/

Test ID: PSTF Protein S Antigen, Plasma; Clinical and Interpretive; [cited 2025 Sep 9]; [about 4 screens]. Available from: https://www.mayocliniclabs.com/test-catalog/overview/83049#Clinical-and-Interpretive
